goal: 登记 Claude adapter C1/C2 session launch

summary.title: Register Claude adapter C1/C2 launches
summary.what: Updated the Claude adapter workflow registry and state after launching the first two worker sessions. C1 and C2 both returned pending worktree ids rather than actual thread ids, so the control plane records those pending ids and marks the tasks as launched-pending-thread for later reconciliation.
summary.why: The orchestrator must preserve launcher truth in the canonical control plane instead of inventing thread ids or leaving the registry stale.
summary.user_goal: 登记 Claude adapter C1/C2 session launch

decisions.chose: Record pending worktree ids for C1 and C2 and defer actual thread id reconciliation.
decisions.rationale: The thread list did not return actual C1/C2 thread ids yet; pending ids are the only truthful launch evidence currently available.

decisions.chose: Leave C3 planned until C1 evidence is available and leave C4 planned until C2/C3 handoffs are reconciled.
decisions.rationale: C3 depends on current evidence and C4 depends on settled ingestion and filtering policies.

rejected.alternative: Fill the registry with guessed thread ids
rejected.reason: No actual thread ids were visible through list_threads, so guessing would corrupt the control plane.
C3 needs C1 evidence and would otherwise duplicate or race the evidence packet.

review_notes: Actual commit files are session-registry.md and workflow-state.md only.
Mainline prepare shows the full branch diff from origin/main, so the files_touched list includes the already sealed C0 control-plane files.
Validation: git diff --cached --check passed before commit.
No implementation, public docs, release, global install, push, PR, merge, or production action was performed.

architectural_claims: The canonical registry must record pending launch ids when actual Codex thread ids are not yet available.
C3 should wait for C1 evidence and C4 should wait for C2/C3 reconciliation.
